title: DEKTON 3PC 3.7M x 3.7M Coloured Polythene Dust Sheet, Protects Against Paint, Dirt, and Dust, Ideal for Painting, Decorating, DIY, and Car Maintenance, Lightweight and Flexible for Easy Draping
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

Protects from spills, splashes, and dirt: This all-purpose polythene dust sheet provides reliable protection from paint spills, splashes, dust, and dirt, making it ideal for a wide variety of tasks, including decorating, DIY projects, building work, and car maintenance.

Durable and lightweight: Designed for easy handling, the Dekton 3.7M x 3.7M colored dust sheet is light and flexible, making it easy to drape over furniture, floors, and surfaces, while offering durable protection during your work.

Multi-purpose use: Whether you're painting walls, redecorating rooms, working on DIY tasks, or maintaining your car, this dust sheet offers versatile coverage and protection to keep surfaces clean and free from damage.

Convenient size: With its generous 3.7M x 3.7M size, this sheet offers comprehensive coverage, ensuring that larger areas such as floors, furniture, and vehicles are protected from dirt, dust, and potential damage.

Reusable and easy to clean: This durable polythene dust sheet can be reused multiple times, providing long-lasting protection for various projects. It can be easily wiped down or shaken out after use, making cleanup simple and efficient.
